name: codex-flows
description: Full Codex turn automation, backend setup, backend operation, and workspace orchestration guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Run turn automation and operate workspace backends.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows provides Codex guidance for plugin-native turn automation, local workspace backend setup, SSH-backed remote workspace operation, Codex remote-control status, remote turn starts, workspace delegation, and passive workspace lifecycle hooks. This plugin installs the Codex-facing guidance and hook surfaces directly from the Git repository.
defaultPrompt: Author a turn automation script that can skip or start a Codex turn.
Set up the local Codex workspace backend.
Run codex-flows against a remote Codex workspace over SSH.
